creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Requesting maintainer approval to update devel/py-mock to 3.0.5, as per the patch available here:
https://reviews.freebsd.org/D21654

Jesse - can I please politely ask if you would like me to also reset the maintainership of this port to assign it back to the pool? I ask because I noticed you haven't made any changes to this port since 2012, and the last 3 updates (to 2.0.0, to 1.3.0, to 1.0.1) had a maintainer timeout.

Version 3.0.5 includes multiple bugfixes and such for the backport library
that will aid in writing tests where the environment doesn't contain
unittest.mock.
